Meta.title: imor.agency — Turnkey sales system for real estate
Meta.description: Imor Agency — turnkey marketing and sales for real estate. 5 years of experience, 15+ projects. Strategy, content, production, performance ads.
Meta.ogDescription: Over 5 years we've launched 15+ developer projects. Real estate only.

Brand.name: imor agency
Brand.tagline: A results-driven agency. A turnkey sales and marketing studio for the real estate market.

Hero.sub: Over 5 years we've launched 15+ developer projects from scratch — building sales teams, deploying marketing systems and lead-conversion engines. Real estate is our only focus.
Hero.statCap: High-quality lead conversion. 556 qualified leads, 14 sales, CPL — just $1.0. Marketing spend: $1,045.

Advantages.h2: Marketing isn't a cost — it's an investment.
Advantages.sub: The Imor Agency approach is built on exactly that principle: your marketing has to be an investment that delivers measurable returns.

items.title: Tight specialisation
items.desc: 5 years of experience, exclusively in real estate. We don't dilute our focus across other niches.

items.title: Real outcomes
items.desc: The goal isn't lead volume — it's actual buyers and closed deals.

items.title: Audit & oversight
items.desc: We surface gaps in the sales team's process and reinforce the workflow.

items.title: Sharp analytics
items.desc: Decisions grounded in numbers and real reporting. No guesswork.

Services.sub: Imor Agency covers the full performance-marketing stack — from strategy to systemisation. Each direction works not in isolation, but as a single coherent system.
Services.footMeta: 15+ projects · 5 years of experience · Real estate only

items.title: Strategy & Audit
items.shortDesc: Market and competitor research, a custom marketing strategy, and a sales-funnel audit.
list: A custom marketing strategy for your project
Sales-funnel audit and identification of effective channels

items.title: Content & SMM
items.shortDesc: A sales-driven content plan, professional social-media management, branding and packaging.

items.title: Production
items.shortDesc: Video, Reels, motion graphics and visual content production.
list: Dynamic motion graphics and visual design

items.title: Systemisation
items.shortDesc: Team training, CRM setup and transparent reporting.

items.title: Performance Ads
items.shortDesc: Facebook & Instagram targeted advertising, lead generation and optimisation.
list: Lead generation (a steady flow of qualified buyers)

items.title: Sales
items.shortDesc: Sales-process audit, conversion optimisation and close collaboration with the sales team.
list: Daily contact and monitoring with the sales team

Process.sub: Every project follows a clear path — from analysis to optimisation. That gives you transparency and us a repeatable result.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.desc: Clear KPIs and an action plan.

steps.title: Packaging
steps.desc: Visual packaging, design and Landing Page preparation.

steps.title: Optimisation
steps.desc: Performance review, reporting and process reinforcement.

Pricing.h2: Pick the package that fits your project.
Pricing.sub: Every month — a full cycle. The targeted-ads budget is not included in the package and is billed separately.

FinalCta.h2: A strategy for your project — one call away.
FinalCta.sub: In a 30-minute free consultation we'll audit your project, find the gaps in your sales funnel and lay out a clear roadmap.

Footer.tagline: We don't just do SMM — we build a complete marketing system for your business. Drive sales through performance marketing and branding.
Footer.address: Mirzo Ulugbek district, 13 Shahriobod Street, Tashkent, Uzbekistan
